name: MHC_class3_chr6
description: MHC class III region on chr6p21.32-33, central ~700 kb wedged between class I (telomeric) and class II (centromeric). Highest gene density in the human genome (~60 genes in 700 kb). Contains complement components (C2, C4A, C4B, CFB), heat-shock proteins (HSPA1A, HSPA1B, HSPA1L), tumour necrosis factor cluster (TNF, LTA, LTB), and steroid 21-hydroxylase CYP21A2 with its CYP21A1P pseudogene. C4A/C4B copy number is highly variable (0-6 copies per haplotype) and the CYP21A2/CYP21A1P pair is a classic ~98% identical paralog requiring PSV-aware mapping for congenital adrenal hyperplasia diagnostics.
expected_copy_count: 1 per haplotype for most genes; C4A/C4B copy number 0-6 per haplotype (RCCX module); CYP21A2/CYP21A1P pair with 98% identity
